notes.sg-extinction-risk-climate-change-enviro: This is a specific type of ecological niche modeling, which is already covered by 'ecological niche'.
notes.sg-extinction-risk-climate-change-r-pack: This seems to be a tool or method rather than a core topic. Merging to 'model selection' as it relates to modeling.
notes.sg-extinction-risk-climate-change-ensemb: This is a specific type of forecasting of species distributions.
notes.sg-extinction-risk-climate-change-foreca: This is a more specific version of 'forecasting of species distributions'.
